data.title: Electrified Thermal Solutions launches first commercial-scale Joule Hive™ Thermal Battery, offering industries low-cost, clean heat up to 1,800°C.
data.description: A new system operating at a multi-megawatt scale demonstrates that industries now have the ability to obtain affordable, environmentally friendly high-temperature electrified heat reaching up to 1,800°C. Electrified Thermal Solutions, headquartered in Boston and known for their large-scale low-cost thermal energy storage solutions, disclosed this innovation on January 23, 2026. This development signifies a significant advancement in providing efficient heat solutions for industrial applications.

data.title: US Anesthesia Partners collaborates with GE to bring AI into anesthesia, focusing on improving patient experience and clinician productivity.
data.description: US Anesthesia Partners, Inc. (USAP) has revealed a new partnership with GE on Jan. 23, 2026 in Dallas. The collaboration's main objective is to develop innovative tools to enhance patient satisfaction and results, as well as to boost efficiency for healthcare providers and hospitals. This initiative is designed to address the growing demands within the healthcare sector.

data.title: Stock futures decline after 2 days of gains. U.S. Final GDP at 4.4%, PCE at 2.8%, Dow Jones -0.39%, S&P 500 -0.16%, Nasdaq 100 -0.23%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Friday after two days of gains, following President Trump's decision to withdraw tariffs on the European Union. The U.S. Final GDP for Q3 was 4.4%, slightly beating estimates of 4.3%. Personal Consumption Expenditures price index grew by 2.8% year-over-year, in line with expectations, with Core PCE also at 2.8%. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.23%, while the two-year bond stood at 3.60%. Markets are pricing a 95% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining interest rates in January. Index Performance showed declines: Dow Jones -0.39%, S&P 500 -0.16%, Nasdaq 100 -0.23%, Russell 2000 -0.27%. Pre-market, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF, were lower with SPY down 0.19% at $688.98 and QQQ down 0.26% at $620.76. Capital One Financial Corp. shares (NYSE: COF) slid by 3.31% following Q4 results that missed analyst estimates. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: National Asset Services sells 56,700 sq ft. senior living asset in Vacaville, Calif., on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: In Vacaville, California, on January 23, 2026, National Asset Services (NAS), a top commercial real estate company, managed the profitable sale of Paramount House Senior Living. This facility spans 56,700 square feet and is located in Vacaville, CA. NAS handled the sale on behalf of the company...

data.title: Consumer Product Events highlights top Valentine's Day gifts for 2026 in Malibu, featuring products that will make partners and pets happy.
data.description: In Malibu, California, as of January 23, 2026, the experts at Consumer Product Events are showcasing the top products for Valentine's Day 2026. They have compiled a list of the most beloved items that are sure to impress partners and pets alike. One of the highlighted items is Barkada, dedicated to providing the best gifts for this special occasion.

data.title: PwC's latest report asserts institutional adoption in crypto has crossed the irreversible threshold.
data.description: In its most recent report, the prominent accounting firm asserts that institutional adoption has become so widespread in the cryptocurrency market that it is now irreversible.

data.title: KNOREX appoints Michael Sun as CFO, effective January 22, 2026, to support growth in AI-driven advertising.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California & Singapore, KNOREX Ltd. (NYSE American: KNRX) has appointed Ning (Michael) Sun as Chief Financial Officer ("CFO") as of January 22, 2026. KNOREX, a top provider of AI-driven programmatic online advertising solutions, made this move to bolster its executive team amidst preparations for accelerated growth. Sun's new role is pivotal as the company gears up for its next phase of expansion.

data.title: Northern Jet attains a remarkable 98.2% renewal rate on Private Advantage Cards in 2025, showing commitment to exceptional service.
data.description: Northern Jet, a prominent private aviation company based in ORLANDO, Fla., made a notable announcement on Jan. 23, 2026. The company reported an exceptional 98.2% renewal rate, highlighting their unwavering dedication to providing top-notch service and tailored experiences to their clients. This unparalleled level of loyalty from customers underscores Northern Jet's commitment to excellence in the private aviation sector.

data.title: Pair Team acquires Town Square to enhance care for Medicare/Medicaid beneficiaries, leveraging technology.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 23, 2026, Pair Team, a medical group specializing in AI technology for underserved communities, revealed their acquisition of Town Square, a company focused on social care coordination. This strategic move aims to advance Pair Team's initiative in developing tech-centric care strategies.

data.title: Morphy's auction includes vintage car signage and advertising. With highlights like an Ace High Motor Oil tin sign and OK Used Cars neon sign. Jan. 23, 2026 /PRNewswire
data.description: A top-quality tin sign for Ace High Motor Oil, a double-sided porcelain neon sign for OK Used Cars, and a Hancock Gasoline porcelain pump plate featuring a full-feather rooster graphic will be up for auction in Denver, Pennsylvania, on January 23, 2026. The auction event by Morphy's is set to attract collectors with a passion for unique and well-preserved memorabilia related to automotive history.

data.title: Tim Christin appointed as Managing Director of Proviniti's Risk and Information Security Practice in New York on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: On Jan. 23, 2026, Proviniti, a top enterprise technology solutions provider, appointed Tim Christin as the new Managing Director of its Risk and Information Security Practice. Christin, a renowned industry expert, will assume the role immediately.

data.title: Dignitas partners with ExtraMile for Roadtrip Campaign from Phoenix-LA Fortnite Tour to LCS Opening Weekend Tailgate.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 23, 2026, Dignitas, the esports division of New Meta Entertainment, Inc. (NME), revealed a partnership with ExtraMile for their Official Roadtrip Campaign. This campaign is set to lead a Phoenix to Los Angeles Fortnite tour, ultimately culminating in the LCS Opening Weekend Tailgate event. The collaboration aims to enhance the experience for fans and participants involved in the tour.

data.title: CANEUS and Maharashtra Govt partner to establish global innovation institute in Davos. Announcement made on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: A groundbreaking initiative to establish the world's premier global Mid-TRL Innovation Acceleration and Skilling Institute for Aerospace, Space, Energy, and Deep Technology has been revealed in Davos, Switzerland on January 23, 2026. In a collaboration between CANEUS International and the Government of Maharashtra, India, this institute aims to lead in catalyzing innovation and expertise in key sectors. The project signifies a significant step towards fostering technological advancement on a global scale, with estimated investments and resources projected to reach substantial figures.

data.title: Carolina Walk-Ins in Greer, SC helps homeowners in Upstate South Carolina create safer, more affordable bathroom transformations. #HomeImprovement #GreerSC
data.description: In Greer, South Carolina, on January 23, 2026, Carolina Walk-Ins, a bathroom remodeling company based in Upstate South Carolina, is facilitating the renovation of bathrooms for homeowners. The family-owned and locally operated company focuses on creating modern and secure bathroom spaces at a reasonable price.

data.title: Kurt Defenbaugh appointed President of AllyRetina by AllyGPO to enhance services for growing membership.
data.description: An experienced retina specialist has been selected to enhance innovative services for a quickly expanding membership base. On January 23, 2026, in FRISCO, Texas, AllyGPO® revealed Kurt Defenbaugh as the new President of AllyRetina®, the company's group purchasing organization specialized in retina. This strategic decision signals a dedication to advancing technology-oriented initiatives within the organization as it continues to grow.

data.title: National Police Association supports No Bounties on Badges Act amid rising attacks on officers. Criminal cartels and extremists pose severe threats.
data.description: In Indianapolis on January 23, 2026, reports indicate a concerning rise in aggressive and bold attacks, harassment, and threats targeting law enforcement officers. The Department of Homeland Security has disclosed receiving intelligence pointing to criminal cartels collaborating with domestic extremist groups. This collaboration has led to an escalation in violence and endangerment to law enforcement personnel. The severity of these incidents underscores the urgent need for enhanced security measures to protect officers in the line of duty.

data.title: ASUS makes 11th appearance on Fortune's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list, focusing on innovation and product excellence.
data.description: For the 11th consecutive year, ASUS has been selected for Fortune's 2026 World’s Most Admired Companies List. This recognition underscores ASUS's commitment to innovation, responsibility, and product excellence. This achievement showcases ASUS's enduring reputation and standing in the global business landscape.

data.title: Alico, Inc. will announce Q1 2026 financial results on Feb 4, 2026 after market close. Nasdaq: ALCO.
data.description: Alico, Inc. revealed today in Fort Myers, Florida, that they will be unveiling their financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 4, 2026, post-market closure. The Company, identified as Alico (Nasdaq: ALCO), is set to disclose these figures then.
